query:
SELECT 
  pp.id,
  pp.projectId,
  pp.amount,
  pp.paymentDate,
  pp.type,
  p.dataOrigin,
  p.totalAmount,
  p.name
FROM projectPayments pp
LEFT JOIN projects p ON pp.projectId = p.id
ORDER BY pp.projectId, pp.paymentDate;
